name: memory39
description: Temporal-priority memory system for AI agents. Store and recall events, facts, people, and places with intelligent scoring (relevance + importance + recency).

binaryPath.description: Path to the memory39 binary. Defaults to 'memory39' (must be in PATH).

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to memory39's default location.

binaryPath.label: Binary path
binaryPath.help: Absolute path to the memory39 binary, or leave empty to use PATH

dbPath.label: Database path
dbPath.help: Path to the SQLite memory database
